message:
fix: eliminate TDZ ReferenceError for SortableArcadeCard on /arcade (#3479) (#3482)

Replace local SortableArcadeCard and ArcadeDragPreviewCard definitions
with the shared SortableDashboardCard and DragPreviewCard from
lib/dashboards, eliminating the Temporal Dead Zone issue that caused
19 runtime errors on the /arcade page. Also removes now-unused imports
(memo, useSortable, CSS, CardWrapper, CARD_COMPONENTS, DEMO_DATA_CARDS,
formatCardTitle, useMobile, GripVertical, AlertTriangle).

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
